rationale: The cited paper directly examines argument/informational versus emotion-based TV ad appeals with observed behavioral outcomes and moderator-driven heterogeneity (market age), which closely overlaps the citing paper’s core constructs (informational vs emotional TV content effectiveness across conditions). The citing note states it extends prior advertising-content research, and this 2001 JMR study is a plausible foundational source in that stream rather than an incidental background mention.
